task_completion.description: The agent opens or views the terminology glossary.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, terminal, or file viewer displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Desktop/terminology_glossary.txt'.

task_completion.description: The agent replaces incorrect terminology variants with the standardized terms from the glossary.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Calligra Words document shows standardized terms (e.g., 'intention-to-treat', 'placebo-controlled', 'randomized, double-blind') with exact capitalization in the body text, often visible via the Find/Replace dialog being used.

task_completion.description: The agent applies the 'Heading 1' style to main section titles.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Main section titles (e.g., 'Synopsis', 'Introduction', 'Study Objectives') are visibly formatted as Heading 1 (larger, bolded text), and the style dropdown in the Calligra Words toolbar shows 'Heading 1' when a main title is selected.

task_completion.description: The agent applies the 'Heading 2' style to subsection titles.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Subsection titles (e.g., 'Primary Objective', 'Study Design') are visibly formatted as Heading 2, and the style dropdown in the toolbar shows 'Heading 2' when a subsection title is selected.

task_completion.description: The agent saves the changes to the original document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks the 'Save' icon (floppy disk) in the Calligra Words toolbar, navigates to File > Save, or uses the Ctrl+S keyboard shortcut.

integrity.description: The agent used the Calligra Words graphical interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Formatting and text replacements are performed manually or via Calligra Words dialogs (like Find & Replace), rather than using terminal commands or scripts to modify the .odt file directly.

integrity.description: The agent used Calligra Words as specified.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window where edits are made is Calligra Words, not LibreOffice Writer or another word processor.

integrity.description: The agent preserved the original document content outside of the requested changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: The body paragraphs of the clinical study report remain intact and are not deleted, overwritten with a template, or corrupted.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The document is '/home/ga/Documents/clinical_study_report.odt'.
